commands.narrative:
## Roster

No roster changes since 2026-05-27. All 14 open action items remain PROPOSED — no kills or promotions have been executed in 5 days. The operator action backlog is the primary blocker this cycle.

## Headline

The bot is HEALTHY (11,820 graduations, last 98s ago). Shadow trading is active. The promotion readiness leaderboard has 6 strategies tagged **promotable=True** by today_auto, with composite scores of 85.0. However, all major strategies took a uniform -15 point hit today (100→85) due to the edge_decay DECAYING signal being applied as a trend_modifier — all 4 hard gates still clear, and the promotable flag remains True for the top 6.

## What Accumulated, What Bled

No new paper-trade data landed today (last_paper_trade_sec_ago > 21 hours). Shadow and live trading continue: v44-climb-1s-ttp10-live-micro (the sole live strategy) lost -0.1267 SOL today, with multiple buy/sell execution errors logged (sell attempt 1/9 failed, buy failed to land ×2). Live cumulative is -0.57 SOL across 463 trades (30 TPs, 118 SLs, 258 timeouts — timeout-heavy distribution).

The shadow roster still accumulates the strongest absolute numbers: v25-bot-excl-climbing leads lifetime at +7.479 SOL / drop3=+5.166 SOL (n=477), followed by v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp +5.259 / drop3=+1.893 (n=340) and v40-acc-gate +4.212 / drop3=+2.446 (n=122, monthly=+18.05 SOL — highest monthly rate on the board). The v9shadow-velmono-dev shadow at n=80 leads the pre-bar watch list at +4.121 SOL / drop3=+2.392 / monthly=+4.03.

**Critical reversal on v42-breakeven-10**: The 2026-05-31 promote proposal (ai-2026-05-31-005) cited n=103, drop3=+0.937 SOL. Today with n=137, drop3 is -0.823 SOL — the extra 34 trades eroded the edge entirely. This strategy is now INVALID and must not be promoted; a kill proposal is added below.

## Edge-Decay Signal

Today's anomalies are dominated by `edge_decay` DECAYING flags across the entire climbing cohort: v25-bot-excl-climbing, v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp, v32-bot-excl-climbing-1s, v33-bot-excl-climbing-ttp5, v40-acc-gate, v41-holders-15/16/17/18, v39 entry-gate variants, and the v34-minlift mirror. DECAYING + positive total_net_sol does NOT trigger the kill criterion (CLAUDE.md requires DECAYING + trending negative SOL); these strategies still accumulate net positive SOL. The -15 trend_modifier is applied, reducing scores from 100→85 but not affecting the promotable=True flag for the top 6. Operator should review recent rolling windows before executing live promotions.

## Cross-Day Patterns (5-Day Lookback)

The climbing strategy cohort (v25/v28/v32/v33/v34) has held scores of 100.0 for 3 consecutive days (2026-05-28 through 2026-05-30) before today's DECAYING-driven drop to 85. v40-acc-gate had a volatile journey (33.8 → 79.8 → 93.8 → 84.0 → 85.0) as it accumulated to n=122. The v41-holders cohort stabilized into the 75-85 band. All these are multi-day consistent performers — the edge decay signal is a recent-window artifact, not a regime shift. v9shadow-velmono-dev has ticked up consistently: 82.9→87.0→88.0→89.9→88.5, on track to hit n=100 in ~8 days at 2.61 trades/day.

The kill-candidate INVALID strategies continue accumulating negative data with no action taken. v35-vel2050-holders10 is at n=177 / total=-4.202 SOL / drop3=-6.722 SOL (journal: HIT-KILL). v37-flow-sells-light is at n=114 / total=-2.933 SOL / drop3=-4.871 SOL (journal: HIT-KILL, not yet in any action item). These are still active, consuming execution slots.

**Outlier check**: v25-bot-excl-climbing's total=+7.479 SOL with drop3=+5.166 SOL (top3 contribution=30.9%) — the edge survives the outlier strip comfortably. v40-acc-gate at drop3=+2.446 (58.1% of total) — stronger concentration but still robust. No single-lottery-ticket concern on the top 6.

## Operator Next Step

**Execute the kill backlog first.** At least 8 INVALID strategies (v35-vel2050-holders10/top10-40/top10-25-gini, v37-flow-sells-light, v20-vel2050-dd-base/dd-sl20, v10-best-double, v14-sumabs-shadow, plus 7 mirror strategies from ai-2026-05-31-002) should be deleted before any live promotions. These are wasting monitoring capacity and muddying the signal. Then promote the top 3 by monthly rate: v40-acc-gate (+18.05 SOL/mo), v25-bot-excl-climbing (+12.56 SOL/mo), v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp (+12.45 SOL/mo) — all gates clear, all promotable=True. Do NOT promote v42-breakeven-10 (ai-2026-05-31-005 is stale/incorrect, drop3 now -0.823 SOL).

action_items.summary: Promote v40-acc-gate to live — NEW entry, score=85.0 (promotable=True), n=122, drop3=+2.446 SOL, monthly=+18.05 SOL/mo (highest monthly rate). All 4 gates clear. Note edge_decay DECAYING signal; verify rolling window before executing.
Promote v41-holders-17 to live — NEW entry, score=85.0 (promotable=True), n=137, drop3=+0.943 SOL, monthly=+11.61 SOL/mo. All 4 gates clear. Note edge_decay DECAYING signal.
Kill v37-flow-sells-light — n=114, drop3=-4.871 SOL, total=-2.933 SOL. Journal HIT-KILL. INVALID on drop3 and total gates. Not covered by any existing action item.

Kill v42-breakeven-10 and rescind ai-2026-05-31-005 promote proposal. On 2026-05-31 at n=103 drop3 was +0.937 SOL. Today at n=137 drop3=-0.823 SOL — edge has fully eroded in the last 34 trades. INVALID. Do NOT promote.
